_note: E-Evolve strategy config. The bot may evolve these values over time.

current_market_signals: AI automation tools remain a high-intent SaaS affiliate category because buyers compare recurring tools before subscribing.
Developer-focused digital products such as templates, checklists, prompt packs, and implementation playbooks have high margins and low fulfillment cost.
Newsletter and community funnels work better than one-off social posts when the content earns trust before asking for money.
Short-form and social-commerce ideas can be translated for developers as small demos, tool comparisons, and repeatable workflows.
Practical cost-saving content converts better than generic passive-income content for technical audiences.
monetization_angles: Recommend a concrete build-vs-buy decision that naturally supports a SaaS affiliate or sponsor CTA.
Turn the article into a lead magnet for a small digital product such as a template, checklist, or playbook.
Show how to repurpose one implementation into a newsletter, thread, and productized service offer.
Compare three tools or stacks with transparent tradeoffs and a buyer-intent conclusion.
Explain a repeatable automation that saves money or time for a solo founder or small team.
